Pope Gregory I, known as Gregory the Great. Author of the Moralia in Job.

## References in Commentary

- `source.html#edge-cases` — Moses's command about difficult judgments
  text: "If," he says, "you perceive that a difficult and ambiguous judgment has arisen among you, you shall do whatever those who preside shall say."
- `source.html#edge-cases-p2` — divine Scripture is a river both shallow and deep
  text: "divine Scripture is"
